verifier_evidence.review_scope: Source-first checkpoint-2 review of the repaired assistant sidecar boundary and project-owned control snapshot surface, covering all declared evidence paths plus direct build verification of the repaired `new/user` target.
verifier_evidence.review_coverage: Complete and exhaustive review of all declared checkpoint-2 paths. Verified assistant startup is now config-only at service/link level, connection establishment is deferred into the bridge poll state machine, TCP-only transport remains the sole implementation for this release, vendor assistant APIs remain confined to the assistant-owning bridge, disconnect/send failures degrade readiness without threatening process liveness, and wheel-level/project-owned control snapshot evidence remains available without assistant connectivity. Confirmed `cmake -S new/user -B /tmp/ls2k0300-new-build-check && cmake --build /tmp/ls2k0300-new-build-check -j2` succeeds.
reviewed_axes: assistant optionality and non-blocking startup semantics
assistant foreground poll/publish non-blocking behavior under disconnect and send failure
vendor API confinement to assistant-owning bridge files
project-owned control snapshot boundary and assistant-disabled evidence continuity
unreviewed_axes: live hardware/runtime behavior with a real assistant endpoint
network latency characteristics of external DNS infrastructure
